overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The scene features dense neon signage, wet reflective streets, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and atmospheric haze typical of Night City.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban intersection at night, with the camera walking across a yellow zebra crossing toward a covered walkway. A pedestrian in a red hooded jacket passes by on the right, while tall glass towers loom in the background. The wet asphalt reflects the ambient neon lighting as the camera approaches the red-lit entrance.

exiting covered area back into open street with reduced neon intensity

green neon lighting accenting the ceiling and walls
illuminated vending machine with green glow

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a semi-covered walkway defined by prominent red neon pillars and green accent lighting. The environment shifts from open intersection to sheltered corridor, with the covered roof blocking the sky. The walkway is empty of pedestrians, featuring vending machines and building facades along the sides.

slight right turn to follow sidewalk curve toward neon district

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to an elevated sidewalk bordered by metal railings. An elevated highway overpass dominates the right side while a massive holographic samurai advertisement becomes visible in the distance. The camera follows a pedestrian ahead as it curves along the sidewalk toward the dense neon district.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide scramble crosswalk toward a dense cluster of towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The crowd density increases as pedestrians gather to cross. Upon reaching the other side, the camera enters a commercial district with bright shop fronts and prominent neon signage.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the camera passes various shop fronts and vending machines illuminated by neon lights. Steam rises from street vents creating atmospheric haze. The holographic billboards fade into the distance as the camera continues deeper into the neon-lit urban canyon, with building overhangs partially blocking the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked urban intersection into a sheltered corridor and finally out toward a sprawling neon district. It begins by crossing a yellow zebra crossing under the gaze of towering glass skyscrapers, with the wet asphalt reflecting ambient lights as a pedestrian in a red hooded jacket passes by. As the camera reaches a red-lit entrance, the environment shifts from the open street into a semi-covered walkway defined by red neon pillars and green accent lighting. The scene then opens from this sheltered corridor onto an elevated sidewalk bordered by metal railings, where a massive holographic samurai advertisement emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera curves along the path beneath a dominating highway overpass, following a pedestrian toward the dense glow of the city center.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling public intersection into the depths of a dense, neon-lit commercial canyon. It begins by crossing a wide scramble crosswalk toward a cluster of towering buildings, moving through an increasing crowd of pedestrians. As the camera reaches the other side, the open intersection gives way to a commercial district characterized by bright shop fronts and prominent neon signage. The scene then shifts deeper into the urban corridor, passing illuminated vending machines and rising steam from street vents that create an atmospheric haze. Finally, the holographic billboards fade into the distance as the camera pushes further under heavy building overhangs that partially block the night sky.
